title: behind the scenes of my monochromatic glam for the Academy Museum Gala | GET READY WITH ME
description:
I had so much fun attending the Academy Gala this year! My glam team killed it with this monochromatic brown YSL look that I absolutely loved. Click here to watch for a little peek at how we got ready for the event!

Thank you to YSL & Tiffany's for this amazing look! Click to shop:

https://www.ysl.com/

https://www.tiffany.com/
